name: Oriath's End
explicitMods: Enemies you Kill during Effect have a 29% chance to Explode, dealing a tenth of their maximum Life as Damage of a Random Element
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.
flavourText: Ennui prevailed, until inspiration sparked
a mote of flame, kindled by fury
and all in his path were obliterated.

name: Headhunter
implicitMods: 10% increased Cast Speed during any Flask Effect
explicitMods: 28% increased Damage with Hits against Rare monsters
When you Kill a Rare monster, you gain its Modifiers for 60 seconds
flavourText: "A man's soul rules from a cavern of bone, learns and
judges through flesh-born windows. The heart is meat.
The head is where the Man is."
- Lavianga, Advisor to Kaom

typeLine: Continuous Quicksilver Flask of the Owl
explicitMods: 63% reduced Effect of Curses on you during Effect
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.

name: Maloney's Mechanism
explicitMods: Trigger a Socketed Bow Skill when you Attack with a Bow, with a 1 second Cooldown
5% chance to Blind Enemies on Hit with Attacks
flavourText: Midnight tinkering begets midday murdering;
a sinister shaft surreptitiously shot slays a scoundrel.
I will see them again, but not until my work is done.

socketedItems.secDescrText: An arc of lightning reaches from the caster to a targeted enemy and chains to other enemies. Each time the arc chains, it will also chain a secondary arc to another enemy, but this secondary arc cannot chain further.
explicitMods: 50% more Damage with Hits and Ailments for each remaining Chain
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

name: Torment Desire
explicitMods: 3% chance to receive additional Gem items when opening a Reward Chest in a Heist
2% chance to receive additional Legion items when opening a Reward Chest in a Heist
20% chance in Heists for Jeweller's Orbs to drop as Orbs of Fusing instead

name: Bonemeld
explicitMods: +2 to Level of all Minion Skill Gems
-2% to all Resistances per Minion from your Non-Vaal Skills
4% increased Defences per Minion from your Non-Vaal Skills
Minions gain added Resistances equal to 58% of your Resistances
flavourText: Hills of stark and jagged white it walks,
scratching your ribs without, within.
The Fiend has naught but Empty Eyes,
though sees you, it does, indeed.

name: Wine of the Prophet
explicitMods: Grants a random Divination Buff for 20 seconds when Used
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.
flavourText: "To proclaim a vision of the future is to make it so,
for those that have the will, and the way!"
- High Templar Andronicus

name: Cinderswallow Urn
explicitMods: Recharges 5 Charges when you Consume an Ignited corpse
Enemies Ignited by you during Effect have Malediction
Enemies Ignited by you during Effect take 10% increased Damage
Recover 2% of Mana when you Kill an Enemy during Effect
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.
flavourText: A controlled burn is sometimes necessary for new life.

name: Foulborn Berek's Respite
explicitMods: Adds 25 to 44 Fire Damage to Spells and Attacks
When you Kill an Ignited Enemy, inflict an equivalent Ignite on each nearby Enemy
mutatedMods:
Shocked Enemies you Kill Explode, dealing 5% of
their Life as Lightning Damage which cannot Shock
flavourText: "With Flame licking at his heels
Berek berated the clouds
Until vengeful Storm spewed forth his rains
And Berek held on tight
As Fire screamed and steamed
And fled."
- Berek and the Untamed

name: Malachai's Artifice
explicitMods: +86% to Fire Resistance when Socketed with a Red Gem
+81% to Cold Resistance when Socketed with a Green Gem
+88% to Lightning Resistance when Socketed with a Blue Gem
flavourText: When the wind blows,
Know which way to bend
and watch the others break.

socketedItems.secDescrText: An arc of lightning reaches from the caster to a targeted enemy and chains to other enemies. Each time the arc chains, it will also chain a secondary arc to another enemy, but this secondary arc cannot chain further.
explicitMods: 50% more Damage with Hits and Ailments for each remaining Chain
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

name: Ralakesh's Impatience
implicitMods: +2 to Level of Socketed Minion Gems
explicitMods: Corrupted Blood cannot be inflicted on you
Count as having maximum number of Endurance Charges
flavourText: The Master of a Million Faces lived by one
simple ethos: why make the effort, when
you can simply mimic what others have?

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports skills which create Minions.
explicitMods: Supported Skills have 10% increased Minion Movement Speed
38% more maximum number of Minions from Supported Skills
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.
flavourText: "I have a recurring nightmare... I run...
I scream... but only the dead hear me..."

socketedItems.secDescrText: Summons a Stone Golem. In addition to its melee attack, the Stone Golem uses a rolling charge and a powerful slam that can taunt enemies.
explicitMods: Minions have 40% increased Cooldown Recovery Rate
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports any skill gem. Once this gem reaches level 2 or above, will raise the level of supported gems. Cannot support skills that don't come from gems.

name: The Dark Monarch
explicitMods: +1 to Level of all Minion Skill Gems

Maximum number of Summoned Golems is Doubled
Cannot have Minions other than Summoned Golems
flavourText: "Hate? You speak to me of hate? You have no idea what your persecution inflicts.
How it chokes the heart. Withers the soul. Judge me, and you judge yourself."
- Saresh, last words, to Sekhema Orbala

socketedItems.secDescrText: Summons a Chaos Golem that grants you damage over time and chaos resistance. The Chaos Golem can cast a damage over time Chaos aura and a cascade of Chaos spikes in addition to its melee attack.
explicitMods: Golems grant +16% to Damage over Time Multiplier
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Summons a Lightning Golem that grants you increased attack and cast speed, and mana regeneration. The Lightning Golem fires a projectile spell, creates orbs of Lightning that zap nearby enemies, and casts a temporary aura that grants added Lightning Damage to spells and attacks used by the Golem and its nearby allies.
explicitMods: Golems grant 10% increased Attack and Cast Speed
Golems grant 18 Mana Regenerated per second
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Summons a Stone Golem that grants you life regeneration and defences. In addition to its melee attack, the Stone Golem uses a rolling charge and a powerful slam that can taunt enemies.
explicitMods: Golems grant 105 Life Regenerated per second
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

name: Grace of the Goddess
explicitMods: Gain 55% of Physical Damage as Extra Fire Damage
Gain 37% of Physical Damage as Extra Cold Damage
Gain 55% of Physical Damage as Extra Lightning Damage

+1 to maximum number of Sacred Wisps
+1 to number of Sacred Wisps Summoned
flavourText: In a time of darkness, know that the Draíocht will bring you light.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Grants a buff providing fire damage based on your physical damage. While you have this buff, if you kill an enemy, other enemies near them will be burned based on the overkill damage. The burn inflicted by this skill can only be affected by modifiers to damage over time (burning damage is damage over time).
explicitMods: Base Burning Damage is 30% of Overkill Damage
Buff grants 20% of your Physical Damage as Extra Fire Damage
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Grants a buff which lets you deal more physical damage. When you kill an enemy while you have this buff, this skill will summon a Sentinel of Purity, or refresh the duration and life of an existing one instead if you have the maximum number of them. The Sentinels of Purity have a single-target melee attack and an area melee attack.
explicitMods: Summon a Sentinel of Purity when you Kill an Enemy
20% chance to Summon a Sentinel of Purity when you Hit a Rare or Unique Enemy
Minions have 40% increased Cooldown Recovery Rate
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

properties.name: Attack, Melee, AoE, Movement, Travel, Physical

socketedItems.secDescrText: Charges at a targeted location or enemy, pushing away enemies in your path and repeatedly dealing off-hand damage in a small area in front of you. You deal damage in a larger area when you reach the target. The further you travel, the more damage you deal, and the greater your chance of stunning enemies.
explicitMods: 252 to 378 Base Off Hand Physical Damage
8 to 12 Added Physical Damage per 15 Armour or Evasion Rating on Shield
75% increased Stun Threshold reduction on enemies at Maximum charge distance
100% more Damage with Hits at Maximum Charge Distance
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

craftedMods: 40% reduced Effect of Chill and Shock on you

implicitMods: 10% of Physical Damage from Hits taken as Chaos Damage
27% increased Effect of Buffs granted by your Golems

roving storms died most horrible deaths.

flavourText: "We are all connected. Each of us burns with the same fire.
Queen Hyrri knew that... she chooses to battle still, somewhere
beyond Hinekora's sight. There must be a very good reason."

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports spell skills that hit enemies and have no reservation. Cannot support brand skills, orb skills, channelling skills, arcane skills, Vaal skills or skills used by traps or mines. Cannot modify the skills of minions.

flavourText: Immortality could grant Catarina the time necessary to shape
a better world... but building requires sacrifice, and the useless
would be crushed into the foundation of her new utopia.

healing, no revenge. There was only... emptiness."
- Chieftainess Ahuana of the Ramako Tribe
